Selecting Your Niche:
“A Large Hungry Mob Of
Addicts Flush With Cash
(and Accessible).”
Module 1 - Lesson 1

-- 1 of 4 --

Selecting Your Niche:
Niche Selection Criteria:!
• Large!
• Hungry!
• Mob!
• Addicts!
• Flush with Cash!
• Accessible
Module 1 - Lesson 1

-- 2 of 4 --

Selecting Your Niche:
6 Questions To Assess Markets:!
• 	Is this market large enough to support my business?!
• 	Does this market display an existing appetite for the types of
products I want to provide?!
• 	Does this market congregate somewhere?!
• 	Does this market consistently invest in their hunger for more?!
• 	Does this market have money?!
• 	Can I access this market online?
Module 1 - Lesson 1

-- 3 of 4 --

Selecting Your Niche:
Other Factors To Consider:!
• 	Affinity!
• 	Gender!
• 	Trends!
• 	Psychographics!
• 	Marketplace Churn/Turnover!
• 	Price Sensitivity!
• 	Regulatory/Legality Issues!
• 	Seasonality Factors!
• 	Potential For Renewable/Continuity
Module 1 - Lesson 1

-- 4 of 4 --
